cn: 爱护自然的人 / 喜欢种东西
covers: 爱护自然的人 · 喜欢种植物蔬菜的人 · 关心环境的人
chain: 岳父 → 小城种苹果树 → 热爱自然、慢节奏 → 厨余当肥料、不浪费 → 不是口号式环保、是生活方式 → 环保从日常小事开始
short: The person I'd like to talk about is my wife's grandfather. He lives in a small city and has a large area of apple trees. He enjoys taking care of them because he likes nature and a slow-paced lifestyle. He also uses kitchen waste as fertilizer and avoids wasting things, which makes me feel that environmental protection can start from simple daily habits.

cn: 想颁布的法律 / 环保法律
covers: 想颁布的新法律 · 保护环境的法律
chain: 限一次性塑料包装(外卖/快递) → 用量大、只用一次 → 鼓励可回收、减一次性餐具、超量收环保费 → 初期不便 → 长远城市更干净、逼企业用环保包装
short: A law I would like to introduce is a law to reduce single-use plastic packaging in food delivery and express delivery. This is important because people order food and packages almost every day, and a lot of plastic is used only once. The law could encourage restaurants and platforms to use recyclable packaging and reduce unnecessary cutlery. It may be inconvenient at first, but in the long run, it would make cities cleaner and reduce waste.

cn: 包含动物的故事 / 书
chain: 《西游记》 → 小时候看电视剧 → 孙悟空:聪明/强大/叛逆 → 猪八戒:搞笑/很人性 → 取经路上打怪 → 有想象力、老少各有解读
short: A story that includes animal-like characters is Journey to the West. I knew it when I was a child, mainly through the TV series. The Monkey King is my favorite character because he is clever, powerful, and rebellious. I like this story because it is imaginative and fun, and different people can understand it in different ways.

cn: 早起 / 汽车旅行 / 开始新阶段
covers: 早起经历 · 汽车旅行 · 开始新阶段 · 重要旅程
chain: 去香港读博那天早起 → 4点起、打车去机场 → 城市还没醒、我已启程 → 移民排队、顺利到达 → 新篇章 → 重要的改变来自等待和准备
short: A time when I got up very early was the day I went to Hong Kong to start my PhD. I got up at around 4 a.m. and took a taxi to the airport. I remember looking out of the window and thinking that the city had not woken up yet, but I was already leaving for a new stage of life. The journey went smoothly, and it taught me that important changes often come after waiting and preparation.

cn: 花很久回复 / 给建议
covers: 花很久回复信息 · 很久没收到回复 · 给别人建议 · 帮助别人 · 鼓励别人
chain: 师弟问PhD申请 → 不想敷衍 → 先问同学导师名额、整理经验 → Excel追踪、系统联系、拆成小步 → 他没那么焦虑、开始行动 → 我有成就感
short: I once spent a long time replying to a junior student who asked me about PhD applications. I didn't want to give a careless answer, so I asked some classmates about supervisor positions and then shared my own experience in detail. I told the student to use an Excel sheet, contact supervisors systematically, and break the process into smaller steps. The student felt less anxious afterward, and I felt a sense of achievement.

chain: 学术研讨会/科研会议 → 可能讨论未发表/机密数据 → 隐私+数据安全 → 专注、尊重讲者 → 手机有用、但不该无处不在
short: A situation where people are not allowed to use their phones is during academic seminars or research meetings. I think this rule is reasonable because people may discuss unpublished data or confidential ideas, so using phones freely may create privacy problems. It also helps concentration and shows respect to the speaker. Phones are useful, but they shouldn't appear everywhere.

covers: 特别场合的食物 · 特殊的食物
chain: 延安煎饼 → 卷豆腐干、辣油孜然芝麻 → 清爽微辣 → 家里通常买不自己做 → 只在家乡常见 → 强烈的家乡认同
short: A special food from my hometown is Yan'an jianbing. It is usually wrapped with dried tofu and seasoned with chili oil, cumin, and sesame. It tastes fresh, light, and a little spicy. What makes it special is that it is almost only common in my hometown, so it gives me a strong sense of local identity.

covers: 参加过但不享受音乐的场合
chain: 同学拉我去古典音乐会 → 他喜欢、我出于好奇 → 安静、慢、严肃 → 犯困、比上课还累 → 不懂结构 → 不是不好、只是不合口味 → 各有所好
short: A music event I didn't really enjoy was a classical concert I went to with a classmate. He loved it, but I found it quite boring — the place was very quiet and the music was slower and more serious than I expected. I even felt sleepy. It wasn't bad, just not my taste. It taught me that different people enjoy music in very different ways.

chain: 《控方证人》 → 在家和太太看 → 经典法庭片、阿加莎 → 谋杀审判、一直反转 → 结局出人意料 → 好电影不靠特效、靠剧本和反转
short: A movie I enjoyed recently was Witness for the Prosecution. I watched it at home with my wife. It is a classic courtroom film about a murder trial. What I liked most was the unpredictable ending. I kept guessing what would happen, but the final twist still surprised me.

covers: 看过并喜欢的现场体育
chain: 2018英雄联盟全球总决赛 → 宿舍和室友线上看 → IG夺冠、LPL首冠 → 全场沸腾、全校庆祝 → 电竞=激情+集体记忆(不输传统体育)
short: A live sports event I enjoyed was the 2018 League of Legends World Championship final. I watched it online in my dormitory with my roommates. IG won the championship, and it was the first time the LPL region won Worlds, so everyone was extremely excited. The whole school felt like it was celebrating together, and that atmosphere was unforgettable.

chain: Sam Altman(OpenAI CEO) → 与现代AI发展紧密相关 → 每天用AI工具 → 想问AI未来10年怎么改变医疗/科研 → 不只旁观、想参与其中
short: A famous person I'd like to meet is Sam Altman. I'm interested in him because he is closely connected to the development of modern AI. If I met him, I would ask how AI might change healthcare and scientific research in the future. I don't just want to watch this change happen; I want to be part of it.

chain: Apple『Think Different』 → 爱因斯坦/甘地/毕加索 → 风格简洁有力 → 不讲技术细节 → 不只卖产品、卖一种价值 → 让人记住一个理念
short: An advertisement I remember is Apple's Think Different campaign. It featured many famous people, such as Einstein, Gandhi, and Picasso. I liked it because the style was simple but powerful. It didn't just sell a product; it promoted creativity, courage, and independent thinking.

covers: 拥有成功商业的人 · 成功的商人
chain: 雷军/小米 → 手机+消费电子 → 进军电动车SU7 → 真诚直接、有热情 → 懂普通用户需求 → 手机造车是硬转型 → 商业要解决真问题、不是炒作
short: A person with a successful business I'd like to talk about is Lei Jun, the founder of Xiaomi. Xiaomi started with smartphones and consumer electronics, and now it has entered the electric vehicle industry with the SU7. I think he is successful because he seems sincere and passionate, and Xiaomi understands what ordinary users need. What I learned from him is that business should solve real problems, not just create hype.
